result.stdout:
Usage is Xsl-Viewer [xmlfile xslfile | *.* | *.xml transform.[xsl | xslt]] [--force-htm | --help | --no-launch | --path=<folder> ]
xmlfile: Must include at least one xml file, can use * as wildcard
xslfile: Must supply only one xsl or xslt file, can use * as wildcard
--no-launch: Don't open rendered file
--force-html: If html has xml or self closing tags then this will enforce a html output format
--version: Show current version of tool
--path=<folder>: Set a different destination folder. Can use quotes after equals. Will attempt to create if missing
--rename=${name}.newext: Allows created files to be renamed. Name is the value of the original xml.
--help: This message
NOTE: To update run dotnet tool update CuginiTech.Xsl-Viewer
